# emoji del día

> A minimalist single-page mood tracker. One question per day, one emoji per answer, one funny description that is neither therapeutic nor scientifically valid. Available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese.

## What it does

The app asks "how are you feeling today?" and returns a date-seeded emoji + a short, self-aware description in the user's language. The same mood on the same day always returns the same emoji — results are deterministic but can be re-rolled with a randomizer.

A 30-day history grid shows past entries. One mood per day. Everything is stored in the browser via LocalStorage — no data leaves the device.

## Moods

- Feliz / Happy / Feliz (😊)
- Cansado / Tired / Cansado (😴)
- Estresado / Stressed / Estressado (😤)
- Motivado / Motivated / Motivado (💪)
- Caótico / Chaotic / Caótico (🌀)
- Misterioso / Mysterious / Misterioso (🕵️)
- Hambriento / Hungry / Faminto (🍕)
- Filosófico / Philosophical / Filosófico (🤔)

## Key behaviors

- **Date-seeded picks**: `seededRandom(dateDigits + moodId.length * 37)` — deterministic per day
- **Randomizer**: free re-roll from the mood's emoji pool (slot-machine animation, ~16 ticks at 75ms)
- **History**: last 30 days, stored as `{ moodId, idx }` in `localStorage` key `emojiday_v2`
- **Theme**: dark / light via `document.startViewTransition()` + CSS `::view-transition-*`
- **Language detection**: reads `navigator.languages`, maps base code to `es | en | pt`, falls back to `es`
- **Easter egg**: clicking the sun logo 7 times within 1.8 s triggers a hidden modal

## Tech stack

| Layer | Detail |
|---|---|
| Markup | Single `index.html` |
| Styles | CSS custom properties, View Transitions API |
| Logic | Vanilla JS (ES2020), no framework, no bundler |
| Font | Space Grotesk via Google Fonts |
| Storage | `localStorage` only — no network requests from app logic |
| Favicon | Adaptive SVG (`favicon.svg`) with `prefers-color-scheme` |

## Languages

Fully translated UI and descriptions: Spanish (`es`), English (`en`), Portuguese (`pt`).
Auto-detected from `navigator.languages` on first visit. Persisted in `localStorage`.

- `favicon.svg` — adaptive sun-face icon
